git.tag_target_sha_policy: Codex may create and push v0.5.0-alpha only after real PyPI upload, clean PyPI install smoke, and the final verifier with package-availability=published pass on the selected release commit.

public.title: chore: lock post-review effectiveness thresholds and add durable knowledge records

publication_verifier_modes.prepublish: Build-only release gate. Must not emit tag guidance.
publication_verifier_modes.published: Requires real clean install from PyPI before passing.
